---
title: 'STAT 424 Spring 2026 - Final Project'
author: 'Alison Tan, Kian Sharifzadeh, Krish Doshi, Lauren Yee'
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdata_document: default
  html_document:
    number_sections: true
  word_document: default
---

```{r setup}
data <- read.csv('data.csv', header=TRUE)
```


```{r data-cleaning}

#Removing Unused Columns
data <- data[c(-1, -5, -6, -8, -9, -12, -13, -14, -15, -16, -20, -22, -27, -29, -33)]

```

```{r data-splitting}

anthropometric <- c("Age", "Weightkg", "Heightcm")
service        <- c("X.1stServe", "X.1stServePointsWon", "X.2ndServePointsWon",
                    "BreakPointsSaved", "ServiceGamesWon", "TotalServicePointsWon")
return_vars    <- c("X.1stServeReturnPointsWon", "X.2ndServeReturnPointsWon",
                    "BreakPointsConverted", "ReturnGamesWon", "ReturnPointsWon",
                    "TotalPointsWon")

# Drop NAs only for variables relevant to each model
data_anthro_100   <- na.omit(data[, c(anthropometric, "Rank100")])
data_service_100  <- na.omit(data[, c(service, "Rank100")])
data_return_100   <- na.omit(data[, c(return_vars, "Rank100")])

data_anthro_300   <- na.omit(data[, c(anthropometric, "Rank300")])
data_service_300  <- na.omit(data[, c(service, "Rank300")])
data_return_300   <- na.omit(data[, c(return_vars, "Rank300")])

data_anthro_500   <- na.omit(data[, c(anthropometric, "Rank500")])
data_service_500  <- na.omit(data[, c(service, "Rank500")])
data_return_500   <- na.omit(data[, c(return_vars, "Rank500")])

```


```{r plots}

library(tidyverse)

data_anthro_100 %>% group_by(Rank100) %>% summarise(mean = mean(Age), sd = sd(Age)) %>% ggplot(mapping = aes(x = Rank100, y = mean)) + geom_point() + geom_line() + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd)) + scale_x_discrete(limits = 1:10) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_width(2)) + labs(title = "Age Range for Rank100")

data_anthro_300 %>% group_by(Rank300) %>% summarise(mean = mean(Age), sd = sd(Age)) %>% ggplot(mapping = aes(x = Rank300, y = mean)) + geom_point() + geom_line() + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd)) + scale_x_discrete(limits = 1:4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_width(2)) + labs(title = "Age Range for Rank300")

data_anthro_500 %>% group_by(Rank500) %>% summarise(mean = mean(Weightkg), sd = sd(Weightkg)) %>% ggplot(mapping = aes(x = Rank500, y = mean)) + geom_point() + geom_line() + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd)) + scale_x_discrete(limits = 1:3) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_width(2)) + labs(title = "Weight (kg) Range for Rank500")

```
